input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed javaTest failure appears to be a behavior/API expectation change around ObjectPropertyAccessor/public-field access in 3.3.5, not missing setup.
OGNL has optional SecurityManager-related behavior controlled by -Dognl.security.manager, but this is not required for normal usage coverage and may be brittle on JDK 25.
Some deep-reflection or upstream-style tests may require JVM --add-opens flags, but normal OGNL parse/get/set coverage on user POJOs does not require adding setup before generation.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process expression/object-graph navigation library; its only runtime dependency, Javassist, is declared transitively by ognl:ognl:3.3.5, and meaningful coverage is reachable without external services, Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
